implementationChanges: Updated src/KynticAI.Scout.Application/Abstractions/StorageAdapterContracts.cs with StorageAdapterDataScope.AuditEvents, migration validation report contracts, StorageExportRequest.DryRun, StorageExportBatch.ValidationReport, and StorageImportRequest.DryRun.

Updated src/KynticAI.Scout.Infrastructure/Extensions/EnterpriseExtensionDefaults.cs so ScoutPostgresStorageAdapter supports export for source events, user signals, selector executions, context facts, provenance metadata, and audit events.
Added validation for tenant ID/slug matching, empty scopes, invalid MaxRecords, unsupported scopes, invalid checkpoints, JSON object fields, and JSON array provenance fields.
Added deterministic local Enterprise/Fortress anchor metadata with entity_type, postgres_pk, and layer while keeping usesCloudDataPlane=false.
Updated tests/KynticAI.Scout.UnitTests/StorageAdapterBoundaryTests.cs with export, dry-run, and unsupported vector-scope coverage.
architectureDecisions: Scout exports only current relational records it actually stores today; it does not claim canonical relationship-set, attribution-path, outcome-event, vector, LanceDB, or pgvector persistence.
The tenant slug is the initial layer mapping for exported anchors; tenant ID/slug mismatches fail closed.
Dry run validates and reports without returning records, writing Scout data, calling Enterprise/Fortress, or calling Cloud.
The Enterprise/Fortress importer must be supplied by the private runtime or a reviewed local private tool; Scout/open-core must not fake it.

Cloud must not receive raw customer data, exact data items, vectors, embeddings, relationship sets, attribution paths, outcome events, prompts, generated content, evidence packs, migration logs, checkpoints, failed payloads, or customer-specific derived intelligence.

verification.result: passed; all projects up to date

Browser/Playwright proof was not run because KYNTIC_RUN_BROWSER_TESTS was not set.
Native vector, LanceDB, pgvector, and model-runtime proof were not run because the relevant opt-in env vars were not set and no native vector adapter was added.
Enterprise/Fortress live adapter/importer proof was not run because this step only implemented Scout-side export and validation.
openRisks: A polished operator CLI wrapper is specified but not implemented.
The private Enterprise/Fortress importer for kynticai.scout.storage-portable-export.v1 is not implemented in Scout/open-core and must not be faked.
Scout does not currently persist canonical exact data items, relationship sets, attribution paths, outcome events, or vectors as first-class local storage.
Enterprise/Fortress LanceDB and pgvector paths still require explicit native-store proof.
Relationship-set and attribution-path import cannot be marked complete until private citation/provenance coverage checks exist.
xhigh review gates are still required before this public API, data-model, storage-boundary, and security-sensitive migration work is marked complete.

nextPrompt: Implement the local operator migration CLI wrapper in Scout or a reviewed private tooling repo. It should call ILocalDataPlaneStorageAdapter.ExportAsync() in dry-run and real modes, persist local batch JSON and validation reports, support checkpoint resume, and stop before import unless the private Enterprise/Fortress kynticai.scout.storage-portable-export.v1 importer is present and has passed local dry-run validation.
